Interface Identified<T extends Identification>

All Known Subinterfaces:
ComprehensiveIdentification, Experiment<I,R>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Account, Act, Administration, AlkaliEarthMetal, AlkaliMetal, AminoAcid, Artifact, ArtificialSatellite, Artist, Artwork, Atom, Bank, Belief, BibliographicalNotice, BioChemicalReaction, Bond, Book, Score, Settlement, Share, SimpleIdentification, Site, Situation, SocialCollective, SocialEntity, SocialNetwork, Society, Solid, Species, SpectralPeak, Spectrum, Sport, SSNIdentification, Star, Statute, Story, StrategicModel, Stratum, StreetSituation, Subject, Subject, Survey, SurveyResponse, Synapse, T, Task, Task, Taxon, Team, TestimonialEvidence, TextQuestion, Thing, TimedPlace, Timeline, Tissue, Tool, Transaction, TransitionMetal, Treatment, Trial, TrialExperiment, Tribe, UUIDIdentification, Variable, Vehicle, Vehicle, Virus, Voter, VRoot, Witness, Worker, WorkSituation
public interface Identified<T extends Identification>
Represents an entity that can be uniquely identified.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    getId()
    Returns the unique identifier of this entity.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      T getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this entity.
      Returns:
      the identifier
